Title: Modernizes, improves fairness, efficiency, transparency, and reduces costs in civil justice procedures; repealer
Summary: Modernizes, improves fairness, efficiency, transparency, and reduces costs in civil justice procedures; clarifies disclosure and discovery procedures to further protect litigants' rights.
LawCode: Rpld §214-a, amd CPLR, generally; add Art 45-B §§1530 - 1534, Gen Bus L; add §5-338, amd §15-108, Gen Ob L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the civil practice law and rules, the general business law and the general obligations law, in relation to modernizing, improving fairness, efficiency, transparency, and reducing costs in civil justice procedures; and to repeal certain provisions of the civil practice law and rules relating thereto
